compiled_state.title: Integration test: compaction on epic-closure ordering contract (validator before compact, atomic rename)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Story
0263-62ba — Migrate 4 consumers to PRECONDITIONS, add compaction on epic-closure with ordering contract

## Objective
Write an integration test that verifies the full compaction ordering contract:
1. epic-closure validator must run BEFORE compaction (simulated by running both in order and asserting the snapshot is absent before compaction)
2. atomic-rename produces the snapshot (no partial-read window observed)
3. `_read_latest_preconditions` transparently handles both flat and snapshot format

## Test File to Create
`tests/integration/test-preconditions-compaction-ordering.sh` (new)

## .test-index entries required
- `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh: tests/integration/test-preconditions-compaction-ordering.sh [test_compact_ordering_snapshot_absent_before_compact]`
- `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh: tests/integration/test-preconditions-compaction-ordering.sh [test_compact_atomic_rename_no_partial_read]`
- `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh: tests/integration/test-preconditions-compaction-ordering.sh [test_read_latest_transparent_flat_vs_snapshot]`

## Test Approach (Given/When/Then)

**test_compact_ordering_snapshot_absent_before_compact:**
- Given: a temp ticket dir with 3 flat PRECONDITIONS events
- When: we verify snapshot file count before calling `_compact_preconditions`
- Then: no `*-PRECONDITIONS-SNAPSHOT.json` file exists before compaction (ordering invariant: compact runs last)

**test_compact_atomic_rename_no_partial_read:**
- Given: a temp ticket dir with 5 PRECONDITIONS events being compacted
- When: `_compact_preconditions` runs and a background reader calls `_read_latest_preconditions` during the compaction window
- Then: the reader always gets a complete payload (never a truncated one); exit 0

**test_read_latest_transparent_flat_vs_snapshot:**
- Given: a temp ticket dir first with flat events only, then after compaction with snapshot only
- When: `_read_latest_preconditions` is called in both states
- Then: both calls return equivalent payloads (same gate_verdicts content); exit 0 in both cases

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `tests/integration/test-preconditions-compaction-ordering.sh` exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/integration/test-preconditions-compaction-ordering.sh
- [ ] All 3 test functions present
  Verify: grep -c "^test_compact\|^test_read_latest_transparent" tests/integration/test-preconditions-compaction-ordering.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
- [ ] All 3 tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/integration/test-preconditions-compaction-ordering.sh
- [ ] .test-index updated with all 3 test entries
  Verify: grep -c "test-preconditions-compaction-ordering.sh" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` exits 0 (no new failures introduced)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh 2>&1 | tail -3

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
